description: Create src/hounfour/billing-finalize-client.ts. BillingFinalizeClient class with finalize() and replayDeadLetter(). S2S JWT with sub/aud/iss claims (ES256, reuses existing S2SJwtSigner with kid). 300ms inline timeout via AbortSignal. actual_cost_micro as string BigInt, validated non-negative. tenant_id in request (not account_id). reservation_id is the idempotency key — arrakis returns 409 on duplicate. DLQ entry schema: {reservation_id, tenant_id, actual_cost_micro, trace_id, reason, response_status, attempt_count, next_attempt_at}. Bounded retries: 5 attempts, exponential backoff. finalize() NEVER throws — always returns FinalizeResult.

title: Coliseum: _register/_patch should stamp entrant kind at registration
description: GAP found during bd-tf74 ops: app.py _register() creates leaderboard entries without a 'kind' field, so new POST /submit entrants serve kind=null until the next boot migration (_migrate_owners_and_kind) backfills them. The viewer's entrantKind() fallback derives kind from pilot+owner so it badges correctly, but the served JSON is inconsistent and relies on a restart. Durable fix: stamp kind (viewer vocab variant/clone/real, via _entrant_kind + _KIND_VIEWER) in _register (and preserve it in _patch) so new rows are born with kind. Data-validity-adjacent -> route through code-implement-and-review (FAGAN-gated) like bd-lfy5. Reference: grimoires/loa/a2a/bug-20260622-e5b852/ops-findings.md
